meaning: adj.可赎回的,可收回的,可弥补的
examples: These vouchers are redeemable against any future purchase.
Their full catalogue costs $5, redeemable against a first order.
Business companies are usually incorporated with limited liability, with open-ended investment companies issuing redeemable shares.
Customers enjoy exclusive savings from partner restaurants and Foodler Points redeemable for food and merchandise.
Cards will be redeemable at all shops and deliver a bigger bang for the buck.
